title: Spicy Basil Keto Toast
description: A flavorful and healthy keto-friendly toast recipe with a kick of spice, topped with fresh basil.
instructions: Toast the keto bread slices in the oven for 5-7 minutes, or until lightly browned.
In a pan, cook the spicy pepperoni slices over medium heat until crispy.
Top each toasted bread slice with a slice of mozzarella cheese, followed by a cooked pepperoni slice.
Place the pan back in the oven and bake for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the cheese is melted.
Garnish with chopped fresh basil leaves and serve immediately.
